description_long: This object is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a smooth, ribbed orange exterior and a short, slightly curved beige stem on top. The pumpkin features a carved face on one side, with sharply angled eyes and a wide, jagged mouth, giving it a menacing, jack-o'-lantern appearance. The carving is deep, exposing the hollow interior and creating dramatic shadows within the facial features. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is uncarved, maintaining the natural segmented texture typical of pumpkins. The coloration is predominantly a rich orange, with subtle shading that accentuates the ridges and curves. The stem appears sturdy and is attached firmly at the top center.
description: A round orange pumpkin with a beige stem and a carved, menacing jack-o'-lantern face on one side. The surface is ribbed and smooth, with deep cutouts for the facial features.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is seen from the back, showing its smooth, ribbed orange surface and the beige stem, with no visible carvings.
description_view_1: This side view reveals part of the carved face, with the edge of an eye and mouth cutout visible, along with the ribbed orange surface and stem.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full carved jack-o'-lantern face, including sharp eyes and a jagged mouth, with the stem centered above.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the pumpkin's ribbed surface and stem, with a partial glimpse of the mouth cutout on the left edge.
attribute_carving_pattern: The pumpkin is carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, featuring sharply angled, menacing eyes and a wide, jagged mouth with pointed teeth. The cutouts are deep and geometric, giving the face an intimidating expression. There are no additional motifs or surface etchings beyond the facial features.
